prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985、211、双一流；软科主榜 2026 年约第 20 名，近年排名稳中有升（2021 年第 22 名→2026 年第 20 名），属全国顶尖高校；2026 年声誉评价偏负面（涉及 PPT 贬低其他专业争议、期末考试作弊回应争议等），但无重大负面舆情；抖音热度总排名第 66 位（评价一般）；2021–2025 年无投档断档记录，报考心理整体稳定；第五轮学科评估 A- 及以上共 20 个，其中化学工程与技术 A+、管理科学与工程 A+、仪器科学与技术 A、光学工程 A、动力工程及工程热物理 A、土木工程 A、建筑学 A、机械工程 A、水利工程 A 等，工科实力极强，对高分考生吸引力大。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 2026 年重庆物理类考生约 13.7 万人（按历史比例估算），较 2025 年 13.9 万人略降；天津大学 2026 年物理类招生专业以工科试验班大类为主，涵盖人工智能、计算机、电气等热门方向，报考热度较高；天津大学位于天津市（直辖市），与重庆市无特殊地域偏好；该校在重庆招生占比约 2.5%（2025 年），属中等水平。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续后移趋势（近 3 年后移约 1746 名）、2026 年物理类计划缩招 19%（加剧竞争）、学校顶尖层次与强大工科优势（对考生吸引力强）等因素，在 2025 年基准 5142 名基础上，缩招效应推动位次前移，但历年持续后移趋势更为显著，两相抵消后预测最低位次约4551名，区间4051–5051名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were approximately 2543→2872→3396→3792→5142, showing a continuous backward trend, with a cumulative backward shift of about 1746 places in the last 3 years, and a 2025 baseline of about 5142 places; the provincial Physics Category enrollment plan was 58 in 2021, 52 in 2022, 54 in 2023, 47 in 2024, and 47 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 38, a reduction of 9 (about 19%) compared to 2025, intensifying competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class; ranked approximately 20th in the 2026 Soft Science main ranking, with a stable upward trend in recent years (22nd in 2021 to 20th in 2026), belonging to the top national universities; the 2026 reputation evaluation is somewhat negative (involving controversies such as PPT disparaging other majors and cheating responses in final exams), but no major negative public opinion; Douyin heat overall ranking 66th (average evaluation); no record of enrollment gaps from 2021 to 2025, with overall stable application psychology; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, 20 disciplines were rated A- or above, including Chemical Engineering and Technology A+, Management Science and Engineering A+, Instrument Science and Technology A, Optical Engineering A, Power Engineering and Engineering Thermophysics A, Civil Engineering A, Architecture A, Mechanical Engineering A, Water Conservancy Engineering A, etc., with extremely strong engineering strength, attracting high-scoring candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In 2026, the number of Physics Category candidates in Chongqing is about 137,000 (estimated by historical proportion), slightly down from 139,000 in 2025; Tianjin University's 2026 Physics Category enrollment majors are mainly engineering experimental classes, covering popular directions such as artificial intelligence, computer science, and electrical engineering, with high application popularity; Tianjin University is located in Tianjin (municipality directly under the central government), with no special regional preference for Chongqing; the university's enrollment proportion in Chongqing is about 2.5% (2025), at a medium level.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward trend of historical rankings (backward shift of about 1746 places in the last 3 years), the 19% reduction in Physics Category enrollment in 2026 (intensifying competition), the university's top level and strong engineering advantages (strong attraction to candidates), based on the 2025 baseline of 5142 places, the enrollment reduction effect pushes the ranking forward, but the historical continuous backward trend is more significant; after offsetting, the predicted minimum ranking is about 4551, with a range of 4051–5051.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 4051–5051, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, use Tier 1 majors for a stretch, and Tier 3 majors as a safety net; if your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 4051), you can focus on aiming for Tier 1 flagship majors (Intelligence and Computing, Electrical and Information); if your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (e.g., around 5000), you should choose Tier 3 majors as a stable option.
